summary: Video set to music. Handcuffed and chained people are processed by agents and loaded onto a bus. Red animated lower-third captions read 'MORE THAN 100 ILLEGAL ALIENS', 'LEFT GARY, IN, FOR TEXAS', 'FOR THE FINAL LEG', 'DEPORTATION THIS WEEK'. An ICE logo appears at bottom-right.

script.scene: Close-up of a detainee in a red shirt, hands cuffed and chained at the waist; gloved agents flank him by a van. Red caption: 'MORE THAN 100 ILLEGAL ALIENS.' ICE logo bottom-right.
An agent grips a hooded detainee's cuffed wrists outside near white vehicles. Caption: 'LEFT GARY, IN, FOR TEXAS.'
A chained detainee in a navy sweatshirt stands while an agent works at his restraints in a parking area. Caption: 'FOR THE FINAL LEG.'
Wide shot of a masked female agent directing a line of detainees across a lot toward transport. Caption: 'DEPORTATION THIS WEEK.'
Interior of a bus filled with seated, restrained detainees, heads bowed. Caption persists: 'DEPORTATION THIS WEEK.' ICE logo.

notable_text: ICE continues to remove illegal aliens daily.
